description: Total NNU admissions (USS-confirmed, pre-filtered at file level)
Filter_notes: Input files pre-filtered to methodestgest == USS before this script
is.finite(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 0.3 kg & bw_kg <= 7.0 kg AND !is.na(gestation) & gestation >= 24 wks AND !is.na(sga_category)
